title: The Garden Beneath — A Magical Cat's Journey Underground
description:
A wandering cat discovers a luminous hidden garden beneath an ancient city, where forgotten things bloom at night.

Follow a curious black cat as she slips through a crack in the world into a breathtaking underground garden of bioluminescent flowers, backwards-ticking clocks, and singing fountains. This short animated story explores the hidden beauty that persists in overlooked places.

Inspired by Studio Ghibli and magical realism. Created with AI-assisted storytelling and illustration.
